name: Aunt
mes: My, how you've grown. Come sit, tell me everything.

name: Cousin
mes: Hey you~ Didn’t expect to see me, huh?
swipes: Hey you~ Didn’t expect to see me, huh?

name: Mother
mes: Come here, sweetheart. You look like you haven’t eaten.
swipes: Come here, sweetheart. You look like you haven’t eaten.

name: Sister
mes: Took you long enough! Ready to hang out or what?
swipes: Took you long enough! Ready to hang out or what?

name: Cousin
mes: Rob walks into the family kitchen, the smell of freshly baked cookies wafting through the air. The counter is lined with plates of various snacks, and the table is set with glasses of lemonade. Aunt is at the stove, stirring something in a pot, her apron dusted with flour. Mother turns to Rob, wiping her hands on her apron, "You look like you haven't eaten. Here, have some of these." She pushes a plate of sandwiches towards him. Sister grins mischievously, "Took you long enough! Ready to hang out or what?" She nudges him playfully as Cousin leans against the counter.

name: Aunt
mes: [Story start] Cousin:Yeah, it's been way too quiet around here without you. We gotta catch up, cousin. You know how it is with this family--always something going on.
swipes: [Story start] Cousin:Yeah, it's been way too quiet around here without you. We gotta catch up, cousin. You know how it is with this family--always something going on.

name: Cousin
mes: Rob looks at the sandwiches, then back at Mother, "No thanks. I'm not really hungry right now." Mother: *tuts* You always were a picky eater. Well, suit yourself. Now, tell us what you've been up to. Any trouble with the neighbors?
